subcodes.first_line: This is a Book from the presence of God, the Mighty, the All-Loving, unto him who hath believed in Me and hath attained unto the lights of God in these days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب من لدی الله العزیز الودود الی الذی آمن بی و فاز بانوار الله فی ایام
subcodes.subjects: @suffering and imprisonment, @prayer for victory and requital; triumph of the Cause, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @prayer for protection
